title: IV Administration Sets and Syringes
entry_mechanism: PSAP Track 2 — International medical device manufacturer JV at Saudi industrial zone
executive_summary:
Intravenous (IV) administration sets and syringes are among the highest-volume medical consumables in any healthcare system. Saudi Arabia's hospital network — including 500+ hospitals and 2,000+ primary care centres — consumes hundreds of millions of these items annually, all imported. The SFDA (Saudi Food and Drug Authority) has increasingly stringent localisation requirements for government procurement, and NIDLP's medical device localisation target creates a policy-driven demand pull for domestic production.

IV sets and syringes are manufactured using injection moulding of medical-grade plastics (polypropylene, PVC) and assembly operations. Saudi Arabia's petrochemical supply chain — SABIC's medical-grade polymer compounds — provides direct material cost advantage. The manufacturing processes (injection moulding, clean room assembly, sterilisation) are well-established and multiple international manufacturers actively seek Gulf manufacturing partners.

The global IV administration set market was valued at $4.8 billion in 2024. Saudi Arabia's addressable domestic market is estimated at $200–300 million annually. Full domestic production would create 800–1,200 manufacturing jobs and eliminate a critical healthcare supply chain vulnerability.

companies.name: Becton Dickinson (BD)
companies.rationale: BD is the world's largest medical device company with major syringe and IV set manufacturing. BD has established manufacturing JVs in multiple emerging markets.

companies.name: ICU Medical
companies.rationale: ICU Medical specialises in IV infusion therapy and has international manufacturing partnerships.

companies.name: B. Braun
companies.rationale: B. Braun manufactures IV sets and infusion products globally. Non-US European technology with active Gulf market relationships.

companies.name: Fresenius Kabi
companies.rationale: Fresenius Kabi produces IV solutions and administration sets with active Middle East market presence.

companies.name: Nipro Corporation
companies.rationale: Nipro manufactures syringes and IV sets at scale and has international manufacturing JV experience.

partners.name: SABIC / Medical Grade Polymers
partners.upgrade: Establish SABIC medical polymer supply agreement with Saudi IV set manufacturer; SABIC medical-grade certification; Saudi material content in IV sets

partners.name: NUPCO
partners.upgrade: NUPCO 5-year offtake agreement for Saudi-manufactured IV sets and syringes; quality audit and SFDA compliance verification; anchor that enables BD or B. Braun JV investment decision

partners.name: SFDA (Saudi FDA)
partners.upgrade: SFDA Class II device manufacturing licence expedited process; SFDA-FDA/CE mutual recognition framework; regulatory sandbox for Saudi medical device manufacturers

partners.name: Dammam Industrial City (2nd IC)
partners.current: Industrial zone with medical device cluster
partners.upgrade: Dedicated medical device manufacturing zone; shared clean room and sterilisation infrastructure; ISO 13485 cluster certification framework
